active_profile_source: S08 visual/formal contract, S09B artifact packet, and S10_text_callout_context only
producer_return_obligations: artifact/caption candidate bundle with S10_text_callout_context but without LaTeX placement binding
downstream_design_force: S12 receives artifact/caption bundle with source-data, panel-claim, caption-claim, and LaTeX-slot traces
S13 can review figure/caption risks against S08, S10 callouts, and current LaTeX placement
S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can verify rendered figure/caption presence, references, and no template-only visual handoff

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: source data, proof role, caption boundary, or exact LaTeX placement slots are missing for a paper-facing artifact
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: artifact/caption changes claim meaning, proof role, or evidence interpretation, or lacks verifier evidence
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local accessibility, label, manifest, or polish-report defect without meaning drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: non-blocking readability or reviewer-risk concern tracked for S13/S16 attention

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S11 owns artifact/caption production defects; missing visual contract routes to S08, source-data gaps to S01/S08, text-callout gaps to S10/S09B.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH accessibility or polish findings may be repaired locally; do not rerun S04-S10 unless evidence meaning, proof role, or callout binding is wrong.
